S.O. 1258(E).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 14 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the CClltral Government.hereby specities the 9th May, 20i4 as the dale on and from which the provisions of sub-section (3) of section 14 of the said Act shall apply to the Sree Chitra TiruMI Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology, Thiruvananthaputam, being a statutory body within the territory of India and makes the following amendments in the notiticatlon of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Penennel, Public Grievances and PensIons (Department of Personnel and Training) published vide number G.S.R. 730(E), doled the 2nd May, 1986, namely:- In the Schedule ld the said notification, after serial number 206 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and .entries shall be inserted, namely:- S.No. Name of the Corporation/Society/Other Authority L 2. "207. Sree Chitra TiNnal Institute for Medical Science and Technology, Thiruvananthapuram. Status 3. Statutory body under the Ministry of Science and Technology.", [F. No. P-IJ0301J12012-ATj ARCHANA VARMA Jt. Secy. Note.-The Principal notitication was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 730(E), dated the 2nd May, 1986 and subsequently amended vide following notitications numbers.: - ' G.S.R. 1172(E). dated the 31st October. 1986 G.S.R. 84(E), dated the 6th February, 1987 G.S.R. 409(E), dated the 20th April, 1987 G.S.R 542(E), dated the 11th July, 1995 G.S.R. 748(E), dated the 17th December, 1998 G.S.R. 8(E), dated the 4th January, 2002 G.S.R 499(E), dated the 23rd August, 2006 S.O. 1228(E), dated the 25th July, 2007 S.O. 1823(E), dated the 25th October, 2007 S.O. 906(E), dated the 22nd April, 2008 S.O. 2580(E), dated the 31st October, 2008 S.O. 2824(E), dated the 1st December, 2008 S.O. 727(E), dated the 31st March, 201 0 S.O. 2411(E), dated the 4th October, 2010 S.O. 958(E), dated the 12th April, 2013 S.O. 2617(E), dated the 27th August, 2013 Printed by the Manager.
